Build-Depends-Arch: cargo:native, rustc:native (>= 1.81.0), libstd-rust-dev, librust-abscissa-core-0.9+default-dev, librust-cargo-lock-11+default-dev, librust-clap-4+default-dev, librust-display-error-chain-0.2+default-dev, librust-home-0.5+default-dev, librust-rustsec-0.30+binary-scanning-dev, librust-rustsec-0.30+default-dev, librust-rustsec-0.30+dependency-tree-dev, librust-serde-1+default-dev, librust-serde-1+serde-derive-dev, librust-serde-json-1+default-dev, librust-thiserror-1+default-dev
